steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"issued = 1213797248
treas = 640674
shares_outstanding = issued - treas
price = 20.94
assets_total = 109541000000
ca = 24895000000 + 0
ca2 = 7730000000 + 96000000
ca_total = ca2
passivo_circ = 20470000000
circulante = 24895000000
capital_giro = circulante - passivo_circ
# Better: use Ativo Circulante and Passivo Circulante as per data
ativocirc = 24895000000
passivocirc = 20470000000
capital_giro = ativocirc - passivocirc
# 12m figures
receita12m = 30615000000
ebit12m = 9709000000
net_income12m = 3687000000
gross_margin_12m = None
net_revenue_per_share = receita12m / shares_outstanding
LPA = net_income12m / shares_outstanding
VPA = 32638000000.0 / 1213797248.0
EBIT_ratio_asset = ebit12m / assets_total
cap_giro_per_share = capital_giro / shares_outstanding
# EBITDA: EBIT + D&A (12m)
dep_amt = 2872000000
EBITDA = ebit12m + dep_amt
market_cap = shares_outstanding * price
net_debt = 109541000000 - 7826000000
EV = market_cap + net_debt
P_EBITDA = price / (EBITDA / shares_outstanding)
P_EBIT = price / (ebit12m / shares_outstanding)
PSR = price / (receita12m / shares_outstanding)
P_Av = price / (assets_total / shares_outstanding)
P_cap_giro = price / (capital_giro / shares_outstanding)
P_ativ_circ_liq = price / (capital_giro / shares_outstanding) # same if no other adjustments
Giro_Ativos = receita12m / assets_total
Giro_Ativos_qtr = None
print('Shares outstanding', shares_outstanding)
print('P/L', price / (net_income12m / shares_outstanding))
print('LPA', LPA)
print('VPA', VPA)
print('P/VP', price / VPA)
print('P/EBIT', price / (ebit12m / shares_outstanding))
print('PSR', PSR)
print('P/Ativos', P_Av)
print('Cap Giro', capital_giro, 'per share', cap_giro_per_share, 'P/Cap Giro', P_cap_giro)
print('Giro Ativos', Giro_Ativos)
print('EV/EBITDA', EV / EBITDA)
print('EV/EBIT', EV / ebit12m)
print('LPA', LPA, 'VPA', VPA)
print('ROIC', (ebit12m) / (assets_total - 20470000000 -  ?))
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"issued = 1213797248
treas = 640674
shares_outstanding = issued - treas
price = 20.94
assets_total = 109541000000
ca_total = 7730000000 + 96000000
if ca_total < 0:
    ca_total = 0
fornecedores = 4099000000
while False:
    pass
capital_giro = 24895000000 - 20470000000
receita12m = 30615000000
ebit12m = 9709000000
net_income12m = 3687000000
ebit_per_share = ebit12m / shares_outstanding
LPA = net_income12m / shares_outstanding
VPA = 32638000000.0 / shares_outstanding
EBITDA = ebit12m + 2872000000
market_cap = shares_outstanding * price
net_debt = 109541000000 - ca_total
EV = market_cap + net_debt
P_EBIT = price / (ebit12m / shares_outstanding)
P_EBITDA = price / (EBITDA / shares_outstanding)
PSR = price / (receita12m / shares_outstanding)
P_Av = price / (assets_total / shares_outstanding)
P_cap_giro = price / (capital_giro / shares_outstanding)
Giro_Ativos = receita12m / assets_total
# ROIC
roic = ebit12m / (assets_total - fornecedores - ca_total)
roe = net_income12m / 32638000000.0
print('shares_outstanding', shares_outstanding)
print('LPA', LPA)
print('VPA', VPA)
print('P/L', price / LPA)
print('P/VP', price / VPA)
print('P/EBIT', P_EBIT)
print('PSR', PSR)
print('P/Ativos', P_Av)
print('Cap Giro', capital_giro, 'per share', P_cap_giro)
print('Giro Ativos', Giro_Ativos)
print('EBITDA', EBITDA)
print('EV', EV)
print('EV/EBITDA', EV / EBITDA)
print('EV/EBIT', EV / ebit12m)
print('ROIC', roic)
print('ROE', roe)
print('12m receitas', receita12m)
print('12m EBIT', ebit12m)
print('12m Net Income', net_income12m)
print('12m net debt', net_debt)
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
